creator: pizzamig@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, thanks for reporting.

This is a general issue when you use origin instead of package name with pkg.
With FLAVOURS, you end up having 3 packages with the same origin, hence pkg will install all packages with that origin.
I guess there is room for improvement, but it's not specific to this port/package. You can reproduce it with other php packages like:

pkg install devel/arcanist

For sure freshport suggestion is wrong, in this case.
The second suggestion is the correct one, explicitly providing the php version, compatible with your current installation.

I will raise this problem in the mailing list.
If you agree, I will close this PR, because it's not phoronix package specific.
